data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: User data is encrypted both in transit and at rest to protect privacy.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Implements a 'never trust, always verify' approach to network security.
data.technical_spec: Requires authentication, authorization, and continuous validation of security configurations.

data.title: Machine Learning-based Threat Detection
data.description: Utilizes AI algorithms to detect unusual patterns that may indicate security threats.
data.technical_spec: Advanced anomaly detection and automated alerts through machine learning models.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Enhances account security by requiring multiple forms of verification.
data.technical_spec: Supports authentication factors such as SMS, app-generated tokens, and biometric data.

data.title: Regular Security Audits and Penetration Testing
data.description: Conducts frequent security reviews to identify and mitigate risks.
data.technical_spec: Engagement with third-party security firms and internal red teams for comprehensive testing.
